title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd!
